Class CookingStartTrigger

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.skill.trigger.CookingStartTrigger
All Implemented Interfaces:
PassiveTrigger
public final class CookingStartTrigger extends Object implements PassiveTrigger
Trigger token fired when a cooking station starts a new recipe cycle.

Passives that reduce cook time write their fractional reductions into this token via addReduction(double). After all passives have fired, the skill reads totalReduction() and applies it to the CookingStartEvent.

Supports debug tracing via record(String, String, boolean).

    The maximum combined reduction that may be applied to cook time.

    • MAX_REDUCTION

      public static final double MAX_REDUCTION
      The maximum combined reduction that may be applied to cook time.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • CookingStartTrigger

      public CookingStartTrigger(CookingRecipe recipe)
      Parameters:
      recipe - the recipe that just started cooking

  • Method Details

    • recipe

      public CookingRecipe recipe()
      Returns:
      the recipe that started cooking

    • addReduction

      public void addReduction(double fraction)
      Accumulates a fractional reduction contribution from a passive.
      Parameters:
      fraction - the reduction fraction to add, e.g. 0.15 for 15%

    • totalReduction

      public double totalReduction()
      Returns the total accumulated cook-time reduction fraction before capping. The service caps this at 0.75 when applying it.
      Returns:
      total reduction fraction

    • record

      public void record(String source, String description, boolean active)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Records an ability's contribution to this trigger for debug tracing. No-op by default; override in concrete trigger classes that support tracing.
      Specified by:
      record in interface PassiveTrigger
      Parameters:
      source - display name of the contributing ability
      description - short human-readable description of what the ability did
      active - true if the contribution came from an active ability

    • traceEntries

      public List<TraceEntry> traceEntries()
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Returns all trace entries recorded on this trigger, in the order they were added. Returns an empty list by default.
      Specified by:
      traceEntries in interface PassiveTrigger
      Returns:
      recorded contributions, or an empty list if tracing is not supported
